files.patch:
@@ -41,1 +41,2 @@
-            for (int size = 1 << 30; size > 0 && pool == null; size >>= 1)
+            // Halving loop starting from max possible size constrained by max heap size
+            for (int size = (int)(Runtime.getRuntime().maxMemory()>>2); size > 0 && pool == null; size >>= 1)
